history.en: The Exotic Shorthair is a gentle friendly cat that has the same personality as the Persian. They love having fun, don’t mind the company of other cats and dogs, also love to curl up for a sleep in a safe place. Exotics love their own people, but around strangers they are cautious at first. Given time, they usually warm up to visitors.
history.zh: 异国短毛猫是一种温柔友好的猫，具有与波斯猫相同的性格。它们喜欢玩乐，不介意与其他猫狗为伴，也喜欢蜷缩在安全的地方睡觉。异国短毛猫热爱自己的家人，但在陌生人面前起初会谨慎。给它们时间，它们通常会逐渐对访客热情起来。

overview.en: The Exotic Shorthair is a remarkably affectionate and sweet-natured breed, often described as a Persian in a short, low-maintenance coat. These cats are loyal, quiet, and peaceful, making them ideal companions for those seeking a calm and devoted pet. They have a playful side and enjoy interactive fun, but they are equally content to curl up in a safe spot for a nap. Exotics form deep bonds with their family members and are generally cautious around strangers initially, though they warm up with time and gentle introductions. Their gentle demeanor and easygoing personality make them wonderful indoor companions who thrive on human attention without being demanding. They are not overly vocal, preferring soft purrs and quiet chirps. Overall, the Exotic Shorthair combines the best of Persian charm with a more practical coat, offering a loving, serene presence in any home.
overview.zh: 异国短毛猫是一种极其深情且性格温顺的品种，常被称为拥有短毛、低维护被毛的波斯猫。它们忠诚、安静且平和，是寻求平静而忠诚宠物的理想伴侣。它们有爱玩的一面，喜欢互动游戏，但也同样满足于蜷缩在安全的地方小睡。异国短毛猫与家庭成员建立深厚的情感纽带，最初对陌生人会保持谨慎，但随着时间的推移和温和的引导，它们通常会变得友好。它们温和的举止和随和的个性使它们成为优秀的室内伴侣，喜欢人类的关注但不会过分依赖。它们不太爱叫，更喜欢轻柔的咕噜声和安静的啾啾声。总体而言，异国短毛猫结合了波斯猫的最佳魅力与更实用的被毛，为任何家庭带来充满爱意与宁静的存在。

care.en: Daily care for an Exotic Shorthair is relatively simple, but routine is important. Grooming: Despite their short coat, they shed moderately and benefit from brushing two to three times a week with a rubber curry brush or soft bristle brush to remove loose hair and reduce shedding. Weekly eye cleaning is essential because their flat faces can cause tear staining; use a damp soft cloth to gently wipe the eye area. Exercise: They are not high-energy, but provide daily play sessions with wand toys, puzzle feeders, or laser pointers for 10–15 minutes to keep them fit and mentally stimulated. Vet visits: Schedule annual check-ups and vaccinations; monitor for signs of brachycephalic issues (breathing difficulties), dental disease, and polycystic kidney disease (PKD). Keep their nails trimmed every 2–3 weeks and clean ears monthly. A consistent routine helps them feel secure and happy.
care.zh: 异国短毛猫的日常护理相对简单，但规律性很重要。梳理毛发：尽管被毛短，它们会适度掉毛，建议每周用橡胶梳或软毛刷刷毛两到三次，以去除死毛并减少掉毛。每周清洁眼睛是必要的，因为它们扁平的脸部容易产生泪痕；用湿软布轻轻擦拭眼部区域。运动：它们精力不算旺盛，但每天需要提供10–15分钟的互动游戏，比如逗猫棒、益智喂食器或激光笔，以保持身体健壮和思维活跃。兽医检查：每年安排体检和疫苗接种；注意观察短头颅相关症状（呼吸困难）、牙齿疾病和多囊肾病。每2–3周修剪指甲，每月清洁耳朵。一致的日常作息能让它们感到安全和快乐。

training.en: Exotic Shorthairs are intelligent and eager to please, making them receptive to positive reinforcement training. Use treats, praise, and clicker training to teach basic commands like 'sit', 'stay', and 'come'. Keep sessions short (5–10 minutes) and fun to maintain their interest. Litter box training is usually straightforward; place the box in a quiet, accessible location and keep it clean. They can be trained to use scratching posts by rewarding them with treats and catnip. Discourage unwanted behaviors like scratching furniture by using double-sided tape or providing alternative surfaces. These cats are sensitive to harsh tones, so always use gentle guidance. Socialization training is important: gradually expose them to new people, pets, and environments from kittenhood to build confidence. With patience and consistency, Exotics learn quickly and enjoy the bonding time with their owner.
training.zh: 异国短毛猫聪明且乐于取悦主人，因此对正面强化训练反应良好。使用零食、表扬和响片训练来教授基本指令，如‘坐下’、‘等待’和‘过来’。保持训练时间短（5–10分钟）且有趣，以维持它们的兴趣。猫砂盆训练通常很简单；将猫砂盆放在安静、方便的位置并保持清洁。通过奖励零食和猫薄荷，可以训练它们使用猫抓板。通过使用双面胶或提供替代表面来阻止抓挠家具等不良行为。这些猫对严厉的语气很敏感，因此始终使用温和的引导。社会化训练很重要：从小逐渐让它们接触新的人、宠物和环境，以建立自信。通过耐心和一致性，异国短毛猫能快速学习，并享受与主人相处的亲密时光。

diet.en: A balanced, high-quality diet is crucial for the Exotic Shorthair's health. Feed a protein-rich, grain-free or limited-grain cat food that lists real meat (chicken, turkey, or fish) as the first ingredient. Wet food is beneficial for hydration and urinary tract health, but high-quality dry kibble can be offered as well. Due to their brachycephalic (flat-faced) structure, they may have difficulty picking up small kibble; choose larger, flat-shaped pieces or pâté-style wet food. Portion control is important to prevent obesity—typically 1/3 to 1/2 cup of dry food per day, divided into two meals, or follow your vet's recommendation. Always provide fresh, clean water. Avoid overfeeding treats and human food. Omega-3 fatty acids (from fish oil) can support skin and coat health. Consult your vet for a tailored feeding plan, especially if your cat has any health conditions.
diet.zh: 均衡、高质量的食物对异国短毛猫的健康至关重要。喂食富含蛋白质、无谷物或低谷物的猫粮，且以真正的肉类（鸡肉、火鸡肉或鱼肉）为首要成分。湿粮有助于水分摄入和泌尿道健康，但高质量的干粮也可以提供。由于它们扁平的脸部结构，可能难以捡起小颗粒的干粮；选择较大、扁平的颗粒或肉泥状的湿粮。控制食量以防肥胖——通常每天1/3到1/2杯干粮，分两餐喂食，或遵循兽医的建议。始终提供新鲜、干净的水。避免过量喂食零食和人类食物。Omega-3脂肪酸（来自鱼油）有助于皮肤和被毛健康。请咨询兽医以制定个性化的喂养计划，特别是当您的猫有任何健康问题时。

livingTips.en: The Exotic Shorthair is an ideal apartment cat due to its calm, quiet nature and moderate exercise needs. They thrive indoors and should not be allowed outside unsupervised due to their flat faces and vulnerability to heat and predators. A home with cozy hiding spots, cat trees, and window perches will keep them content. They are excellent with children, especially if raised with them, as they are patient and gentle. They also get along well with other cats and cat-friendly dogs, thanks to their peaceful temperament. However, they need a predictable, low-stress environment; loud noises and chaotic households may unsettle them. Provide scratching posts, interactive toys, and a clean litter box in a quiet area. With proper enrichment and a loving family, Exotics are happy, healthy companions who bring tranquility to any home.
livingTips.zh: 异国短毛猫因其冷静、安静的性格和适度的运动需求，是理想的公寓猫。它们适合室内生活，不应在无人看管的情况下外出，因为它们扁平的脸部使其容易受热和受到捕食者攻击。一个拥有舒适藏身点、猫爬架和窗台的家会让它们感到满足。它们对孩子非常友好，尤其是从小一起长大的孩子，因为它们耐心且温和。凭借平和的性情，它们也能与其他猫和友善的狗相处融洽。然而，它们需要可预测、低压力的环境；嘈杂的声音和混乱的家庭可能会让它们不安。提供猫抓板、互动玩具和一个放在安静区域的干净猫砂盆。通过适当的丰富环境和充满爱的家庭，异国短毛猫会成为快乐、健康的伴侣，为任何家庭带来宁静。
